title: Hiro's First Day with Animal Friends
synopsis: Hiro is nervous about his first day at school, but discovers that learning is fun when he meets friendly animal classmates who help him with counting, colors, and making new friends.

pages.text: Hiro walked into his new classroom. His tummy felt funny with butterflies! The room was big and bright, full of toys and books. He saw other children playing, but he felt shy. Would anyone want to be his friend?

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing of a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face standing nervously at a classroom door, white chalk outlines of desks and toys, colorful chalk butterflies floating around, dusty texture on dark green board
illustration.alt: Hiro looking nervous on his first day of school

pages.text: A friendly rabbit hopped over to Hiro. 'Hi! I'm Ruby Rabbit. Want to count blocks with me?' Ruby showed Hiro how to stack blocks: one, two, three! Then a wise owl flew down. 'I'm Oliver Owl. Let's learn colors together!' Oliver pointed to red apples, blue balls, and yellow bananas.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing of a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face playing with a white chalk rabbit and owl, colorful chalk blocks stacked up, red apples, blue balls, yellow bananas drawn around them, mathematical equations doodled in corners, dusty artistic texture
illustration.alt: Hiro learning to count and identify colors with animal friends

pages.text: Soon more animal friends joined them. Benny Bear showed Hiro the art corner. Lily Lion helped him sing the ABC song. At snack time, all the animals sat with Hiro. His butterflies were gone! School was fun with friends. Hiro couldn't wait to come back tomorrow and learn more with his new animal buddies.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing of a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting happily at a table with white and colored chalk drawn animals including a bear, lion, rabbit, and owl, ABC letters floating above, art supplies scattered around, warm artistic chalk strokes, dusty texture on dark green board
illustration.alt: Hiro enjoying snack time with all his new animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: How did Hiro feel on his first day of school?
questions.explanation: Hiro felt nervous with butterflies in his tummy and was shy when he saw other children playing.

questions.question: Which animal friend taught Hiro about colors?
questions.explanation: Oliver Owl showed Hiro colors like red apples, blue balls, and yellow bananas.

questions.question: What did Ruby Rabbit teach Hiro?
questions.explanation: Ruby Rabbit showed Hiro how to stack blocks and count: one, two, three!

questions.question: How did Hiro feel at the end of the day?
questions.explanation: Hiro's butterflies were gone and he was excited to come back tomorrow to learn more with his animal friends.
